TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dawu Nsgan Dawu o gaga Nsgan Taitung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 62.59 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 5.7 km², dxgal pmblxan o 43.47 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 4,435, sapah o 1,781, seejiq tnpusu 3,151 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 71%(Paywang). Paywang ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Dawu o niqan 5 alang ni maxal 10. 10 o, Pangwi , Qaljapang , Ru ja qas , Pacavalj , Ku shu shu , Qu chn.la love vn , Tjacupu , Tjukuvulj , Seqeciin , Seqalapit . pusupnyahan patas Snluan qcinuh:Commons
S.PHON: dawu nsgan dawu o gaga nsgan taituŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o **.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o *.* km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **%(pajwaŋ). pajwaŋ ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan dawu o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, paŋwi , qalɟapaŋ , ɾu ɟa qas , paʦa*alɟ , ku sħu sħu , qu ʦħn.la lo*ə *n , tɟaʦupu , tɟuku*ulɟ , səqəʦiin , səqalapit . pusupnjaħan patas snluan qʦinuħ:ʦommons
S.FORM: Dawu Nsgan Dawu o gaga Nsgan Taitung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 62.59 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 5.7 km², dxgal pmblxan o 43.47 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 4,435, sapah o 1,781, seejiq tnpusu 3,151 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 71%(Paywang). Paywang ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Dawu o niqan 5 alang ni maxal 10. 10 o, Pangwi , Qaljapang , Ru ja qas , Pacavalj , Ku shu shu , Qu chn.la love vn , Tjacupu , Tjukuvulj , Seqeciin , Seqalapit . pusupnyahan patas Snluan qcinuh:Commons
